items.prompt: HPWL alone is enough; density can always be ignored in this course.
items.explain: Density labs report overflow; global place must not silently pile cells.

items.prompt: After running the algorithm you should report…
choices: Only a screenshot of the UI
Coordinates plus HPWL (and density when relevant)

items.prompt: Track A asks you to implement simulated annealing placement (HPWL cost) on the tiny placement.
